'''Aargonar 3''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was hotly disputed in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Like [[Aargonar/Legends|the planet it orbited]], it was also home to a number of [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlaccs]].

==History==
Aargonar 3 was later the location of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Aargonar 3 rebel base|base]] wiped out by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] around the same time as the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in the [[Battle of Aargonar (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Aargonar]]. Some of the Rebel personnel there included Commander [[Hamelin]] and [[Gruu Dunrik]]. [[Cala Worner]], the Rebel recruiter, also visited the base. The base was located near to [[The Pit (Aargonar)|the Pit]], home to the moon's most well known sarlacc. This was believed by most to be the only sarlacc on the moon; however, there were in fact several others located in far more isolated areas.

{{Moon-stub}}
